productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men New Amanda Casual Shoes
description: This buckaroo New Amanda casual shoe references the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe is the essence of man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing on the upper leather. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. UpperFull grain leather upper for added durability and styleStitched leather overlay around the foot for better supportLace-up system for a snug, customized FitLightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fitLeather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryWell-cushioned footbed for all-day comfortBrand logo embossed on lateral side of the heelMidsoleEVA midsole with shock absorbersOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant TPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for enhanced grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
